narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: for the west it’s always been the soviet (RUSSIAN) that has ALWAYS been the boogie man..when in fact they were SELDOM a threat.. amerika always blew any comment about RUSSIA or at later stages CHINA way out of proportion.. and you are still doing
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote directly criticizes Western (specifically American) foreign policy and perception, portraying it as hypocritical and alarmist by claiming it unjustly frames Russia as a constant threat when it is 'SELDOM a threat'.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: thanks mostly to un-elected bureaucrats in all “western countries” they are proving the worst of the worst of humanity
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement highlights a negative outcome (being 'the worst of the worst of humanity') attributed directly to the actions of Western governments and their unelected officials.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Sadly the western media is framing the war as if Russia is losing which only prolongs negotiations and causes more death.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote explicitly questions the reliability and motives of Western media, accusing it of harmful misrepresentation ('framing the war') that prolongs conflict.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: lets get on with a full nuke war…wipe us all out …at least it (for most) will be over quickly
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement evokes fear and anxiety about the potential for nuclear war, presenting it as an almost desirable outcome due to despair, which amplifies fears of catastrophic escalation.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Russia is Winning, Nuclear Threat is a Sign of Desperation & Very Serious
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The title of the post and the core premise of the interview speculates on the current outcome of the war ('Russia is Winning') and the potential consequences of nuclear threats.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: amerikans are the greatest pigs on the planet…and that is in the most derogitive term you can imagine.. absolute pigs
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This direct quote provides a severe and derogatory criticism of Western (specifically American) society, labeling them as 'pigs' and 'trash', which aligns with the narrative of discrediting the West by attacking its character and moral standing.
